caption: A woman with dark hair tied in a bun and wearing black headphones sits in a podcast studio, dressed in a dark green t-shirt featuring a red graphic design. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a black backdrop displays the text "SS TALK 101" and "CAST" in large white letters, with "It's A Unique Hustle" and "About It!" also visible. Two framed posters are mounted on the white wall behind her, showing a close-up of hands. On the table in front of her, a translucent cup and a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" are present. Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains a slight smile and looks off-camera to her right, with minimal movement in her posture and expression across the frames.
